name: Genta, Gateman of Dark World
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>暗</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>黒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>門</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>番</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ばん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ゼンタ
desc: You can only Special Summon "Genta, Gateman of Dark World" once per turn. You can discard this card to the GY; add 1 "The Gates of Dark World" from your Deck to your hand. If this card is banished and you control a "Dark World" card: You can Special Summon this card.
mnst_eff: You can only Special Summon "Genta, Gateman of Dark World" once per turn. You can discard this card to the GY; add 1 "The Gates of Dark World" from your Deck to your hand. If this card is banished and you control a "Dark World" card: You can Special Summon this card.
